title: FilterTypesOfFamily
description: FilterTypesOfFamily: IRequest that filters Revit family types that belong to a given Revit family.

FamilyId.description: ElementId of the Revit family, which types are being queried.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
